title: sonnea jonesii
intro: Sonnea jonesii, also known as the Jones' marigold or Coulter's marigold, is a flowering plant in the sunflower family native to the western United States. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating digestive issues, such as stomach ulcers and diarrhea. The health benefits of Sonnea jonesii include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Sonnea jonesii can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
